{{Quote|Any problems—tell the folks at Cikartan's tapcaf in town. They'll know how to contact me.|[[Venku Skirata]]|<ref name="Sacrifice" />}}
'''Cikartan''' was a [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] and the owner of a [[Cikartan's tapcaf|tapcaf]] in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Keldabe/Legends|Keldabe]], the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]]. Cikartan's [[Tapcafe/Legends|tapcaf]] was in operation during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], and its patrons were acquainted with the Mandalorian [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]], [[Venku Skirata]].<ref name="Sacrifice" />

==Behind the scenes==
Cikartan was first introduced through an offhand mention in the [[2007]] novel ''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'', by [[Author/Legends|author]] [[Karen Traviss]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]'' {{1stm}}
